scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run server" "npm run wait-server && npm run client" "npm run voice-ai" "npm run face-ai"
scripts.server: npx kill-port 5000 && npm run dev --prefix server
scripts.install-python: cd server/python_modules && python -m venv venv && venv\Scripts\activate.bat && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.voice-ai: cd server/python_modules && venv\Scripts\activate.bat && python -m uvicorn custom_ai_api:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.face-ai: cd server/python_modules && venv\Scripts\activate.bat && python -m waitress --listen=0.0.0.0:5001 app:app
scripts.full-dev: concurrently "npm run server" "npm run wait-server && npm run client" "npm run voice-ai" "npm run face-ai"
scripts.up: npm run install-all && npm run full-dev
scripts.up:docker: npm run infra:up && npm run full-dev
scripts.health:all: npm run wait-server && npm run wait-face-ai && npm run wait-voice-ai && npm run wait-client
scripts.start-all: npx concurrently "npm run full-dev" "cmd /c start cmd /k cd stable-diffusion-webui \& webui-user.bat" "docker compose up mongodb -d"
scripts.start-all:unix: npx concurrently "npm run full-dev" "cd stable-diffusion-webui && ./webui.sh" "docker compose up mongodb -d"
